chapter_title.en: Chapter on Companions in Travel and the Obligation of Mutual Rights Among Them

text: 2445 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «حَقُّ اَلْمُسَافِرِ أَنْ يُقِيمَ عَلَيْهِ إِخْوَانُهُ إِذَا مَرِضَ ثَلاَثاً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2445 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The right of a traveller is that their companions should stay with them for three days if they fall ill."
